resources.string: Review sensitive capabilities in one place. Switches enable the linked feature, and Configure jumps to the exact setting or Android permission screen.
After the permission or setting is completed, Project Lumen refreshes the status and returns here automatically.
Stores local rest, focus, distance, and ambient-light trends for reports and guidance.
Uploads diagnostics only when enabled; crash reports, face frames, and app inventory stay separate opt-ins.
Keeps active timers visible and reliable when Android moves the app to the background.
Uses the camera permission only for local distance estimates and safe-distance calibration.
Uses the camera permission only for local blink and dry-eye estimates.
Reads ambient light locally to warn about dark environments and support brightness automation.
